short_desc.zh: 支援資料採集與流程串接的高精度智能平台秤
short_desc.en: A high-precision smart platform scale built for data capture and workflow integration

desc.zh: 採用高精度感測技術，長時間輸出穩定可靠
desc.en: Uses high-precision sensing technology for stable long-term performance

desc.zh: 高亮 LED 顯示與直覺操作介面，現場讀值更快速
desc.en: Bright LED display and intuitive controls for faster on-site reading

desc.zh: 支援資料採集與系統對接，讓智能秤進入企業流程
desc.en: Supports data collection and system integration so the smart scale becomes part of your workflow

desc.zh: SUS304 不銹鋼結構，兼顧耐用度與清潔維護性
desc.en: SUS304 stainless structure for durability and easy maintenance

applications.zh: 適合食品加工、倉儲物流、製造產線等需要精準稱重與資料上傳的智能場景。
applications.en: Ideal for food processing, warehouse logistics, and manufacturing lines that require precise weighing with data upload.

desc.zh: 大字體與穩定顯示介面，現場查看重量更迅速
desc.en: Large-font stable display for faster on-site reading

desc.zh: 支援 RS232 / RS485，可連接電腦、工控機與管理系統
desc.en: Supports RS232 / RS485 for PCs, industrial PCs, and management systems

desc.zh: 感測模組反應靈敏，適合日常連續作業
desc.en: Responsive sensing core designed for continuous daily operations

desc.zh: 可調式秤腳與秤台結構，讓智能秤在不同地面都能穩定工作
desc.en: Adjustable feet and platform structure keep the smart scale stable across floor conditions

q.zh: 是否支持智能秤客製化？
q.en: Can the smart scale be customized?

a.zh: 支持，可依據秤台尺寸、承重範圍與通訊需求客製規格。
a.en: Yes. Platform size, capacity, and communication needs can all be customized.

q.en: Can it connect to existing systems?

a.zh: 可透過 RS232 / RS485 與工控機或管理系統對接，作為智能秤資料來源。
a.en: It can integrate with industrial PCs or management systems through RS232 / RS485 as a smart-scale data source.

a.zh: 整機保修一年，感測核心保修兩年。
a.en: One year warranty for the unit and two years for the sensing core.

q.en: Do you provide installation and training?

a.zh: 提供現場安裝、教育訓練與導入支援，協助智能秤快速上線。
a.en: Yes. We provide on-site installation, training, and onboarding support for fast deployment.

sceneTitle.zh: 安卓儀表作為核心，模組化接入現場配件
sceneTitle.en: An Android terminal at the core, with modular accessories connected on demand.

sceneDescription.zh: 以基本配置為主體，逐步接入掃碼槍、USB、列印機、攝像頭與 GPIO 模組，對應現場作業流程。
sceneDescription.en: Start from the base terminal, then attach scanner, USB, printer, camera, and GPIO modules according to workflow needs.

title.zh: 當前裝置使用靜態展示模式，仍可預覽配件邏輯與場景重點
title.en: This device is using static preview mode while still preserving accessory logic and scene emphasis.

description.zh: 若裝置效能不足、偵測到 reduced motion，或尚未提供正式 GLB 素材，系統會切換為靜態版 configurator。
description.en: If the device is underpowered, reduced motion is enabled, or production GLB assets are not ready, the configurator switches to a static presentation mode.

description.zh: 看基本配置與整體外觀
description.en: View the base configuration and overall form.

description.zh: 聚焦安卓儀表與操作介面
description.en: Focus on the Android display and operating interface.

description.zh: 觀察 USB / GPIO 等擴充接口位置
description.en: Inspect USB, GPIO, and expansion interface positions.

description.zh: 連接前側 USB，快速完成條碼讀取。
description.en: Connect to the front USB port for fast barcode scanning.

description.zh: 做離線備份、報表匯出與快速交接。
description.en: Use for offline backup, report export, and rapid handoff.

description.zh: 輸出標籤、收據與現場作業單。
description.en: Print labels, receipts, and on-site operation sheets.

description.zh: 補足現場拍照取證與資料留存。
description.en: Capture on-site imagery for evidence and process records.

description.zh: 透過 GPIO 模組驅動的三色號誌塔燈，對接蜂鳴器與現場訊號控制，讓作業狀態一目了然。
description.en: A three-color signal tower driven by the GPIO module, paired with buzzers and on-site signal control to make operational status instantly visible.

title.zh: 先看智能秤主機本體，建立產品核心印象
title.en: Start with the smart-scale terminal itself to establish the core product impression.

description.zh: 這一幕只呈現基本配置與整體外觀，讓使用者先理解這台智能秤是現場資料節點，而不是單純顯示器。
description.en: This scene focuses on the base setup and overall form so users see the smart scale as an on-site data node, not just a display.

bullets.zh: 安卓儀表與秤體一體化
bullets.en: Integrated Android terminal and weighing body

bullets.zh: 先建立產品辨識，再進入接口細節
bullets.en: Establish product identity before moving into interface details

bullets.zh: 適合作為故事起點與總覽視角
bullets.en: Ideal as the opening scene and overview angle

title.zh: 聚焦安卓儀表與操作畫面，讓智能秤像系統終端一樣被理解
title.en: Focus on the Android display and operating surface so the smart scale is understood like a system terminal.

description.zh: 從這一幕開始，敘事由外觀轉向使用流程，讓客戶理解它能承接輸入、顯示、資料採集與後續系統流程。
description.en: The narrative now shifts from form to usage, helping customers understand how it handles input, display, data capture, and downstream workflows.

bullets.zh: 高亮顯示與直覺操作介面
bullets.en: Bright display with intuitive operator flow

bullets.zh: 承接現場資料輸入與檢視
bullets.en: Supports on-site data entry and review

bullets.zh: 是智能秤體驗的核心入口
bullets.en: Acts as the core entry point of the smart-scale experience

title.zh: 接入掃碼槍後，智能秤開始與條碼流程同步
title.en: Once the scanner is connected, the smart scale begins syncing with barcode-driven workflows.

description.zh: 掃碼槍是最直接的作業延伸，它讓現場辨識、過磅與資料紀錄變成單一流程。
description.en: The scanner is the most immediate operational extension, turning identification, weighing, and record capture into one continuous flow.

bullets.zh: 對應倉儲、產線與出入庫條碼作業
bullets.en: Aligned with warehouse, line-side, and inbound/outbound barcode work

bullets.zh: 讓資料從人工輸入轉向即時擷取
bullets.en: Moves data entry from manual typing to real-time capture

bullets.zh: 是智能秤模組化擴充的第一步
bullets.en: Represents the first step in modular smart-scale expansion

title.zh: 當 USB、列印機與 GPIO 接上後，智能秤就進入系統化作業場景
title.en: When USB, printer, and GPIO are attached, the smart scale enters a fully systemized operating context.

description.zh: 這一幕不是講單一配件，而是讓客戶感受到智能秤如何把資料輸出、標籤列印與現場控制整合成一套流程。
description.en: This scene is not about one accessory alone, but about showing how the smart scale combines data export, label printing, and on-site control into one process.

bullets.zh: USB 做資料備份與匯出
列印機處理標籤與作業單
bullets.en: Printer handles labels and operation slips

bullets.zh: GPIO 對接訊號燈與控制設備
bullets.en: GPIO connects tower lights and control equipment

title.zh: 最後加入 USB 攝像頭，讓智能秤具備影像留證能力
title.en: Finally, add the USB camera so the smart scale gains visual evidence capture capability.

description.zh: 對需要拍照記錄、異常留存或檢驗佐證的場景，這一幕把智能秤從稱重設備推進到可追溯作業節點。
description.en: For environments requiring photo records, anomaly retention, or inspection proof, this scene pushes the smart scale beyond weighing into a traceable operational node.

bullets.zh: 形成資料 + 影像雙軌紀錄
bullets.en: Creates dual-track records across data and imagery

bullets.zh: 強化異常追溯與稽核能力
bullets.en: Strengthens exception tracing and audit capability

bullets.zh: 完成智能秤的閉環故事
